title: Resolve routine problems in an automotive workplace
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Resolve routine problems in an automotive workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the problem

pcs.text: Identify early indicators of problems according to workplace procedures1.2 Confirm existence of problem according to workplace procedures1.3 Identify information regarding problem according to workplace procedures

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify the problem

elements.title: Develop, implement and evaluate solution

pcs.text: Identify a range of possible methods for resolving the problem according to workplace procedures2.2 Analyse strengths and weaknesses of each option2.3 Identify and implement optimal solution according to workplace procedures  2.4 Compare effectiveness of chosen solution against other identified options

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop, implement and evaluate solution

elements.title: Assist others to identify and resolve problems

pcs.text: Provide assistance to help others identify routine problems according to workplace procedures3.2 Discuss problems and potential solutions with others 3.3 Use information gathered through discussion to help resolve problems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Assist others to identify and resolve problems

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
